## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped to a single concern
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build is clean (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII added
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing behavior changed

This project requires changes to land via reviewed pull requests (OpenSSF
